bento.badge: Clients find you. Now make them loyal.
bento.title: Scan, program, reminders —
bento.scanDesc: QR code ready in 2 minutes on your phone. NFC card optional at the counter. No app to download — not for you, not for your client.
bento.programDesc: Stamps or cashback, tiers, rewards, colors — all set up in 2 minutes. A card with your branding that clients show off, share, and that keeps them coming back.
bento.inactivityDesc: A client stops coming? We detect it and send a reminder at the right time. Every follow-up is recovered revenue.
bento.autoDesc: Surprise offers on the big day, seasonal promos scheduled in advance. We handle everything — your clients come back and spend 30% more.

testimonials.t1Q: Hey! You've been on Qarte for 3 months now, could you share some feedback? 🙏

testimonials.t1R3: Now everything's on their phone they love the notification when their free treatment is ready 💅
testimonials.t1R4: oh and thanks for the stickers they look so good 😍
testimonials.t2Q: Hello! 6 weeks on Qarte, what do you think? 😊
testimonials.t2R2: Honestly within 2 weeks I had already made back the subscription cost
testimonials.t2R3: One client came back 3 times just to fill up their card 😂
testimonials.t3Q: Hey! 2 months on Qarte, can we get your feedback? 🙏
testimonials.t3R1: The thing that changes everything is the auto notification
testimonials.t3R2: My clients tell me "oh right I need to come back" 😂
testimonials.t3R3: Honestly I should have signed up sooner
testimonials.t3R4: By the way thanks to Camelia she replies super fast to my questions 🙏
testimonials.t4Q: Hi! Almost 2 months on Qarte, how's it going for you? 😊
testimonials.t4R2: So happy — I used to struggle with paper cards my clients would forget them all the time
testimonials.t4R3: Now it's simple they scan and done
testimonials.t4R4: And on top of that they get a notification when their reward is ready 👏

faq.title: We answer
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: How long to get up and running?
faq.a1: 5 minutes. Account, logo, reward, QR code. You're ready.
faq.q2: Stamps or cashback — which should I choose?
faq.a2: Fixed-price services (nails, lashes, barber) → stamp mode. Variable amounts (hair salon, spa) → cashback mode. You can switch anytime.
faq.a3: Your clients get reminders directly on their phone — no app needed. Automatic follow-ups, rewards to claim, birthdays. Zero effort on your end.
faq.q4: Will my clients find it complicated?
faq.a4: They scan the QR code with their camera and that's it. No app, no account to create. Super simple.
faq.q5: Does it work for home services?
faq.a5: Yes. Show the QR code on your phone, your client scans, their point is validated.
faq.q6: I'm an independent esthetician, is this for me?
faq.a6: Absolutely. Create your program in 5 minutes, manage your clients, grow word-of-mouth.
faq.a7: That's $0.63/day. Just one new client from your pro page and it's paid for. Not to mention ~$200/year saved on paper cards.
faq.q8: Does the price change after the 7-day trial?
faq.a8: No. $19/month, period. Same features during the trial and after. Zero surprises.
faq.a9: 100% GDPR compliant, hosted in Europe, encrypted. Your data stays yours. We never resell anything, ever.
faq.q10: What happens if I cancel Qarte?
faq.a10: Your data belongs to you. CSV export in 1 click. No trap, no commitment.
faq.whatsappTitle: Have a question? Message us directly.
